outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected; positive aggregate GEX (0.03B net) stabilizes price action despite spot overextension from key gamma levels.
outlook.summary: Strong bullish momentum with spot trading 10%+ above all visible strikes. Low PCR (0.13 0DTE, 0.03 MONTHLY) and reverse smirk skew confirm euphoric sentiment. All visible OI/VOL clusters now act as layered support. Critical structural confluence at 5800 (gamma flip + max pain) serves as ultimate mean reversion magnet. No visible resistance above spot - continuation possible but watch for exhaustion.

levels.motivazione: Highest WEEKLY volume cluster (244 VOL) below spot creating immediate support zone. Dealers defend short calls here.

Highest actual OI in dataset (134 0DTE) with MONTHLY volume confluence (31 VOL). Key structural level with established positions.
ULTIMATE CONFLUENCE: Gamma flip (all expiries) + Max Pain (0DTE+MONTHLY) at identical strike. Strong magnetic pull target 10% below spot.
